title: calonema infundibulare
intro: Calonema infundibulare, also known as the calonema orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Calonema infundibulare is often prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
